official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound forget_level_chunk packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official forget_level_chunk body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound forget_level_chunk frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns forget_level_chunk to packet id 0x25.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the forget_level_chunk id to ClientboundForgetLevelChunkPacket.
The official forget_level_chunk body is one ChunkPos encoded by FriendlyByteBuf.writeChunkPos.
The fixture uses ChunkPos(int, int), so it does not require initialized Level, chunk storage, registry contents, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded chunk position, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove chunk unload behavior, client world state, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer chunk unload behavior, client world state, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
